---
title: "daemon.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/daemon.ts"
loc: 81
complexity: 11
logic_score: 5.78
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 9.41
overall_score: 5.55
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 15 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://chokidar)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [runScan](file://./index.js)
- [registry](file://./pathRegistry.js)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [activePersona](file://./personaRegistry.js)
- [CortexLink](file://../../node/cortex_link.js)

### Exports
- `chokidar`
- `P1Daemon`
- `relPath`
- `link`
- `pid`
- `target`
- `daemon`
